intentionalCorrections: Canonical units omit rag-sol2 synthetic separator bytes so every byte is attributable to source records.
Canonical IDs use Go-owned v2 manifest and record identities rather than rag-sol2 JavaScript keys and hashes.
Canonical retrieval collapses each channel before weighted fusion and hydrates source chunks explicitly.
Fixture generation and hash embeddings are named smoke/parity providers and make no model-quality claim.
